name: Rich Cream Cheese Tube Cake
recipeIngredient: 2 tablespoons Rum OR brandy OR cognac
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325 degrees Fahrenheit. Grease a 10-inch tube or bundt pan and set aside.
2. Sift together the flour and baking powder and set aside.
3. Beat together the butter and cream cheese until well blended. Add sugar and beat until light, about 2 minutes.
4. Beat in eggs and flavorings (vanilla extract and lemon rind) then carefully blend in the flour mixture.
5. Pour batter into prepared pan and bake for 75 to 80 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
6. Allow cooling in the pan for 5 minutes before turning out onto a rack to finish cooling.
7. Dust with confectioners' sugar while still warm.
